title: Shi Shaoxia Ganjue Hao Gudan
synopsis:
In the aftermath of chaos, a martial arts prodigy with extraordinary talent emerged—Shi Zhouwu. He came to participate in the "Martial Arts Young Eagle Tournament," hoping to make a name for himself. However, during his battles, the young hero Shi was subjected to the constant displays of affection from various martial arts couples, deeply feeling how lonely it is to be invincible... Although he won the title of "Number One Young Martial Artist," he was not overjoyed. Instead, only one thing occupied his mind—he wanted to fall in love too!

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
